title: 6Pack Vacuum Storage Bags for Clothes, Reusable, 40x60cm Travel Essentials Sealer Compression Bags, Space Saver Vacuum Cubes Packing Bags, for Storage Coats Clothes Towels Bedding Duvet Blanket
features: 【You will get】6pcs vacuum storage bags with dimensions of 40x60cm/15.75 X 23.62inch, which can compress and store clothes,blankets, comforters, pillows, and more. These bags prevent air from entering or leaking, keeping your stored items dry and clean. The storage bags are reusable. Please note that the product does not include a vacuum pump.

【For Exquisite Lifestyle】Carefully selected premium PA + PE materials that are durable and reusable for years. Vacuum compression bags protect your stored items from moisture, dust, mildew, bugs and odors. It is a great way to keep your closet and suitcase neat and organized.

【Double Seal Design】The travel vacuum bags adopt a double seal design, with sealing strips to ensure air isolation. The sturdy double zipper with edges and tight seals on both sides ensure a firm seal, leak-proof, and maximum freshness and protection

【Easy to Use】The must-have travel item, these compression bags make it easy for you to organize your clothes whether you're traveling or at home. They help you solve these troubles effortlessly and free up a significant amount of space. Especially during a move, you won't need to carry additional suitcases, and the transparent bags allow you to easily find the items you need at a glance. They are a helpful assistant in your daily life.

【Perfect Gift】You are making a very wise decision choosing the travel vacuum bag which helps to maximize storage space. It’s an ideal gift for housewarming, birthdays, Thanksgiving or Christmas. If your bag doesn't seal, don’t hesitate to contact us,
